overall.description: Gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator showing a Mercedes-Benz Actros navigating through a snowy industrial warehouse complex at night, completing a delivery, then driving on snow-covered highways and stopping at a traffic light. The sequence shows the truck bobtailing (without trailer) after detaching it at the delivery point.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse approach with snow-covered loading yard

events.description: truck enters covered warehouse loading dock area from snowy exterior

agents.ego_description: driving slowly toward warehouse entrance while pulling a semi-trailer, navigating snow-covered industrial yard

entered.detail: large concrete industrial building with loading dock entrance
snow-covered asphalt and loading yard with tire tracks
metal security fence running along left side of approach
low concrete wall with yellow-black warning stripes

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches a large industrial warehouse at night during a snowfall. The camera moves slowly through the snow-covered loading yard toward a covered dock entrance, passing chain-link fences and concrete barriers. The Mercedes dashboard and steering wheel are visible in the foreground as the vehicle prepares to enter the warehouse.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered loading dock with parked trailers

events.description: delivery completion triggered, trailer detaches, UI shows 'KONIEC DOSTAWY' (End of Delivery)

agents.ego_description: navigating slowly through narrow loading dock between parked trailers and concrete pillars, completing delivery

notable_agents.action: parked semi-trailer with Vespa advertisement livery

entered.detail: roofed loading area with overhead fluorescent lighting
yellow and black striped warning pillars supporting roof
semi-trailer with black livery and white Vespa branding

segments.scene_description: Inside the covered loading dock, the truck navigates between concrete pillars and parked trailers under artificial lighting. The driver completes the delivery as indicated by the Polish text 'KONIEC DOSTAWY' appearing on screen, and the trailer is detached. The truck continues bobtailing through the narrow warehouse interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial exit road transitioning to highway

events.description: exits warehouse into open snowy night environment, accelerating onto main road

agents.ego_description: accelerating out of warehouse exit onto snow-covered roads at night, now bobtailing without trailer

entered.detail: dark tunnel exit leading to snowy exterior
tall sodium vapor lamps illuminating the snowy road
plowed snow banks along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The truck emerges from the warehouse exit into a snowy night, transitioning from artificial to street lighting. Driving without a trailer, the vehicle accelerates along snow-covered asphalt roads lined with snow piles and industrial buildings, with street lights cutting through the falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway during snowstorm at night

events.description: truck reaches cruising speed on highway, windshield wipers active against snow

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on snow-covered highway, maintaining lane position with active windshield wipers

notable_agents.action: semi-truck overtaking in left lane, headlights visible through snow

entered.detail: multi-lane road covered in snow with visible lane markings
metal highway guardrail along left shoulder

segments.scene_description: The truck travels at high speed along a snow-covered multi-lane highway at night. Street lights and guardrails line the road while snow falls steadily, requiring constant windshield wiper use. Another semi-truck overtakes in the left lane as the vehicle passes under an overhead bridge.

events.description: approaching red traffic light at intersection, slowing down
comes to complete stop at red light, waiting to proceed

agents.ego_description: slowing down and stopping at red traffic light at highway intersection, waiting for signal change

notable_agents.action: white car crossing intersection from right to left

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light suspended over intersection
directional sign indicating 'Kobenhavn' and 'Centrum' with arrows

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches a highway intersection marked by a red traffic light and road signs pointing toward Kobenhavn. Slowing down on the snow-covered road, the driver comes to a complete stop at the red light while other vehicles cross the intersection. The dashboard and interior lighting become more prominent as the vehicle halts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a snowy industrial loading yard into a warehouse and back out onto a high-speed winter highway. It begins with the truck navigating through falling snow and past concrete barriers toward a covered dock entrance, with the dashboard visible in the foreground. As the vehicle enters the warehouse, the scene shifts to an artificially lit interior of concrete pillars and parked trailers where the delivery is completed and the trailer is detached. The truck then emerges from the warehouse back into the snowy night, accelerating along asphalt roads lined with industrial buildings before merging onto a multi-lane highway under a steady snowfall. Finally, the camera follows the vehicle as it passes under an overhead bridge and slows to a complete stop at a red traffic light at an intersection pointing toward Kobenhavn.
